# AfroTools

> Free financial tools and calculators for all 54 African countries.

## About
AfroTools provides 400+ free tools including PAYE tax calculators, VAT calculators, currency converters, and education tools for African students and professionals. All tools use real tax logic sourced directly from each country's revenue authority. AI Tax Advisor powered by Claude is available on salary tax tools.

## Tools
- PAYE Calculators: Salary tax calculators for 54 African countries
- VAT Calculators: Value added tax tools for 30+ countries
- Education: GPA calculator, WAEC/NECO calculator, JAMB aggregate
- Currency: Live African currency converter
- Business: Business plan generator, remittance comparator, import duty calculator
- Document & PDF: PDF workspace, invoice generator, CV builder
- Developer: Base64 encoder, hash generator, regex tester, JSON formatter
- Image & Design: Background remover, image compress, logo maker
- Engineering: AfroDraft professional 2D CAD tool
